mapper.select: SELECT tb_schedule_participant.* FROM tb_schedule_participant WHERE tb_schedule_participant.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_schedule_participant.schedule_id = #{scheduleId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY tb_schedule_participant.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_schedule_participant SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND is_deleted = 0
